resources.string: Select files and tap \"To shelf\" in action bar
APK signatures do not match installed version! Installation may fail.
Files will be PERMANENTLY deleted without recovery. This action cannot be undone.
0 = no limit. When exceeded, oldest files are deleted automatically.
Transcoded videos are cached for faster re-casting
File too large for editing (%d KB limit)
No large files (>10 MB) in this category
The file manager requires access to device files. This allows viewing, copying and moving files.
%1$d file(s) already exist in the destination folder. Replace them?
RAR5 format is not supported. Use ZIP or 7z
Cannot open folders with external app
Archive is password protected or corrupted
File with this name already exists: %s
Could not create folder via SAF
Could not create file via SAF

Installed version: %1$s (%2$d)
APK version: %3$s (%4$d)

To install an older version, the current one must be uninstalled first. App data will be lost.
Could not complete uninstall. Try removing the app manually first.
Invalid XAPK file — no APK found
Installing %d split APKs… Confirm in system dialog.
Enable Shizuku for full access to internal data
No app to open this file
This permission is related to location tracking. The app may track where you are.
This permission gives camera access. The app can take photos or record video.
This permission is related to audio — microphone recording or audio file access.
This permission is related to SMS. The app can read, send, or receive text messages.
This permission is related to the phone — device info, calls, or call log.
This permission is related to phone calls — making calls or accessing call history.
This permission gives access to your contacts — reading or modifying them.
This permission gives access to files on the device — reading or writing.
This permission gives access to media files — photos, videos, or music.
This permission is related to Bluetooth — connecting to wireless devices.
This permission is related to Wi-Fi — network info or connections.
This permission is related to network — checking internet connectivity.
This permission gives access to your calendar — reading or adding events.
This permission gives access to device sensors — accelerometer, gyroscope, or health sensors.
This permission is related to notifications — showing or managing them.
This permission is related to alarms and timers.
This permission is related to biometrics — fingerprint or face unlock.
This permission is related to NFC — contactless data transfer.
This permission is related to in-app purchases.
This permission allows using device vibration.
This permission allows the app to start automatically after device boot.
This permission prevents the screen or CPU from sleeping while the app is active.
This permission allows the app to run in the background and show a notification about it.
This permission allows drawing windows on top of other apps.
This permission allows creating home screen shortcuts.
This permission gives access to the fingerprint scanner for authentication.
A technical permission the app requests for its operation. Usually does not affect your privacy.
The app can access the internet — load data, update, show ads, and send information to its servers. Almost all apps have this.
The app will know if you\'re connected to the internet and how — Wi-Fi or mobile data. Used to avoid using mobile data.
The app will see your Wi-Fi network name and connection status. Often needed to download updates and large files only over Wi-Fi.
The app can turn Wi-Fi on and off on your device. Used for automatic network connections.
The app can change network settings — for example, switch between Wi-Fi and mobile internet.
The app can search for nearby Wi-Fi devices. Needed for file transfer between devices via Wi-Fi Direct.
The app gets access to your phone\'s camera. Can take photos and videos, scan QR codes, or make video calls. Camera only works when the app is open.
The app can record sound through the microphone. Used for voice messages, video calls, voice recorder, or voice search. Be aware — the microphone can record everything around.
The app will see all your contacts — names, phone numbers, emails. Usually needed to find friends in the app, but can be used for data collection.
The app can add new contacts and modify existing ones in your address book.
The app will see the list of accounts on the device — Google, email, and others. Used for signing in with an existing account.
The app will get info about your phone — model, carrier, phone number. Often needed for device identification, but can be used for tracking.
The app will see your phone number. Usually needed for automatic registration by number without manual input.
The app can make calls to any number without your confirmation! Be careful — this may result in paid calls.
The app can automatically answer incoming calls. Used in calling apps and auto-responders.
The app will see your entire call history — who you called, who called you, when, and how long each call lasted.
The app can add and delete entries from the call log. Needed for internet telephony apps.
The app will intercept outgoing calls. Used for spam blocking or call forwarding.
The app can send SMS on your behalf. Be careful — sending SMS to premium numbers can cost money!
The app will read all your SMS messages. Usually needed for automatic verification code reading, but gives access to all messages.
The app will receive incoming SMS in real time. Needed to automatically fill in verification codes during registration.
The app will receive incoming MMS — messages with images and video.
The app will know your exact location within a few meters (via GPS). Needed for navigation, maps, and delivery. One of the most sensitive permissions.
The app will know your approximate location — city or district. Less precise than GPS, but sufficient for weather and news.
The app will track your location even when you close it! Needed for navigators and fitness trackers, but can drain battery and track you.
The app can read all files in phone memory — photos, documents, downloads. On older Android versions gives broad access.
The app can save and modify files in phone memory. Needed for downloading files, saving photos and documents.
Full access to ALL files on the device without restrictions! Only needed for file managers, antivirus apps, and backup apps. If this is a regular app — it\'s suspicious.
The app gets access to your photos and images. Needed for profile photo selection, sending in chat, or processing.
The app gets access to your videos. Needed for viewing, sending, or editing video.
The app gets access to your music and audio recordings. Needed for music players and editors.
The app can show you notifications — messages, reminders, news, ads. You can disable them in settings at any time.
The app can manage Do Not Disturb mode. Needed for alarm apps and notification managers.
The app can connect to Bluetooth devices — headphones, speakers, smart watches, printers.
The app can manage Bluetooth — turn on, turn off, and configure device connections.
The app can connect to already known Bluetooth devices — headphones, speakers, watches that you previously paired.
The app will search for nearby Bluetooth devices. Needed when first connecting a new device.
The app can make your device visible to others via Bluetooth. Needed for file transfer between phones.
The app will see all your calendar events — meetings, birthdays, reminders. Can be used for planning.
The app can add events to your calendar and modify existing ones. Needed for planners and schedule apps.
The app will get data from health sensors — heart rate, blood pressure, oxygen level. Needed for fitness apps and health monitoring.
The app will read health sensors even in the background. Needed for continuous heart rate or sleep monitoring.
The app will determine what you\'re doing — walking, running, cycling, or driving. Needed for fitness trackers and pedometers.
The app will get accelerated data from motion sensors. Needed for sports trackers and tilt-controlled games.
The app will offer fingerprint or face recognition login instead of password. Your biometric data is not shared with the app — verification is done by the system.
The app will offer to confirm an action with your fingerprint. Your fingerprint is stored only in the device\'s secure memory.
The app can use vibration — for notifications, alarms, or touch feedback. A harmless permission.
The app won\'t let the phone sleep while performing a task — file download, music playback, navigation. May affect battery usage.
The app will start automatically after phone restart. Needed for alarms, messengers, and monitoring. Many such apps slow down device boot.
The app can run in the background and show an icon in the notification shade. Needed for music players, downloaders, and navigators.
The app can sync data in the background — download or upload files, even when you minimize it.
The app can play music or video in the background — when the screen is off or another app is open.
The app can track location in the background with a notification. Needed for navigators and fitness trackers.
The app can use the camera in the background. Needed for video calls and surveillance apps.
The app can record audio in the background. Needed for call recording, voice recorder, or voice assistants.
The app can offer to install other APK files. Needed for app stores and auto-updates. If this isn\'t a store — be careful.
The app can offer to delete other applications. Needed for antivirus apps and app managers.
The app can show windows on top of all apps! Needed for floating players, call screens, and chat bubbles. Scammers can use it to fake interfaces.
The app will see all installed applications on the device. Needed for antivirus apps and launchers, but can be used to analyze your preferences.
The app can set alarms and reminders at exact times. Needed for alarms, planners, and schedule apps.
The app can trigger at exactly the set time, even in battery saver mode. Needed for alarms.
The app will ask to disable battery optimization for it. Needed for messengers and notification apps, but will increase battery drain.
The app will see usage statistics of other apps — which you open and how long you spend. Needed for screen time control.
The app can exchange data via NFC — contactless payment, reading tags, transit passes, or access cards.
The app will receive notifications about contactless NFC payments.
The app can create a shortcut on your home screen for quick access. A harmless permission.
The app supports purchases through Google Play — subscriptions, feature unlocks, ad removal, or virtual goods.
The app checks its license through Google Play — confirms you legally purchased/downloaded it.
Delete tag \"%s\"? It will be removed from all files.
Tag with this name already exists
PIN must be at least 4 digits
Biometric not available on this device
Also protects access to secure files
Cannot create files in secure view
Index empty. Tap refresh to index files.
Content search includes text files, documents, PDF, and audio/video metadata. Indexing large files may take time.
Point camera at a QR code from another device
Open this URL in any browser to download files
Enable Wi-Fi on the target device before scanning
Both devices must be on the same network
Scan this QR in Haron to connect and download
Battery saver is on. Transfer may be slower or interrupted.
Turn on Wi-Fi to share via QR code (connection not required)
Your network is not suitable for transfer. Enable your phone\'s hotspot — other devices will connect to it and download files.
This drive uses a file system that Android cannot read. Reformat to FAT32 or exFAT to use it with this device.
Assign actions to edge swipes on the file panel
Say \"Haron\" to activate the microphone, then give a command
Tap the microphone button on the main screen and say a command. The app recognizes Russian and English.
Tap the microphone button in the bottom-right corner of the file panel, then speak a command. The result is applied to the active panel.
Open folder by name. Prefixes: open, open folder, go to. Supports all word forms

downloads → Download
documents → Documents
pictures, images → Pictures
photos → DCIM
camera → Camera
movies, video → Movies
music → Music
telegram → Telegram
whatsapp → WhatsApp
screenshots → Screenshots
bluetooth → Bluetooth
notifications → Notifications
ringtones → Ringtones
podcasts → Podcasts
Any other folder — fuzzy search (3 levels deep)

Add to any command:
• "top" / "upper" / "first" — top panel
• "bottom" / "lower" / "second" — bottom panel
Examples: "back top", "copy bottom", "open downloads first"
Refresh folder list for voice navigation
Where to look for books? You can scan all storage or choose specific folders. Folders can be added later.
Press and hold the microphone button to see the list of voice commands
Select file to hide from Explorer
The carrier file (JPEG, PNG, MP4, MP3) will still open normally. Hidden data is encrypted with AES-256 and can only be extracted on this device.
Files received from another app. Save to Downloads or open directly.
Cast is not available on this device
Flip pages on phone, show on TV
Open this URL in a browser on any device in your network:
PIN reset. Set a new one in settings
PIN is always required for protected files
Set up PIN in settings first
Haron is a file manager developed by an independent developer. The app is built from scratch, with no ads and no data collection. Every feature is made with care for user convenience.
Bug reports help make the app better. The more details you provide, the faster the fix.

Please include in your report:

• What happened (describe the problem)
• What you expected to happen
• Steps to reproduce (what you tapped/did)
• Screenshot or screen recording if possible
• Your device info (shown below)
If you like Haron, you can support the development with a donation. This helps keep the app ad-free and actively updated.
Have an idea for a new feature or want to share your opinion? Write to us — we read every message.
Disables animations and reduces background activity

Haron does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data. All files, settings, and credentials are stored locally on your device. Network features (FTP, SMB, WebDAV, cloud sync) connect only to servers you configure. No analytics, no telemetry, no ads.
Haron is part of the VAMP Ecosystem — a suite of Android apps designed to work together. Built with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and open-source libraries. All rights reserved.
File \"%s\" already exists. What do you want to do?
The archive already contains a folder — extracting as is
Selected files (%1$s) exceed the trash limit (%2$s). They can only be deleted permanently.
Required for access to Android/data and Android/obb folders
Shizuku is needed to access Android/data and Android/obb folders. Install it from Play Store or GitHub.
Shizuku is installed but not started. Open the app and start the service.
Swipe to move cursor\nTap to click\nTwo fingers to scroll
Bluetooth remote is not supported on this device. The HID Device profile is missing from your phone\'s Bluetooth stack.
No paired devices. Pair your TV in Bluetooth settings first.
Your phone will act as a Bluetooth keyboard and mouse for TV or PC.
Already paired? Tap device to reconnect:
If phone is already paired with this device — remove it from Bluetooth settings on both devices first
2. On TV/PC open Bluetooth settings → Add new device
3. Find your phone in the list (may show as \"Unknown device\")
4. Connect. After that the device will appear in the list above
Phone is visible for 5 minutes. Connect from TV/PC now.
Connect your cloud storage to browse files
Download target must be a local folder
Used %1$s of %2$s (user partition, excludes Android OS ~24 GB)
No seeders found — try later or different torrent
No links found on this page
Enable Do Not Disturb while playing
Sorting, view, gestures, tags, favorites, bookmarks, animations, security
FTP, SMB, SSH, WebDAV logins and cloud accounts (Yandex, GDrive, Dropbox)
Book library, reading positions, video playback positions
Credentials will be decrypted from device storage and encrypted with this password in the backup file. Without a password, anyone with access to the file can read your logins and passwords.
All current settings will be overwritten with backup data. Continue?
This backup is encrypted. Enter the password you set when creating it.
Files will be decrypted from device storage. Password is required.
File too large — copy to device first

Caches generated image thumbnails from ext4 USB drives on device storage. Avoids re-reading images from USB each time you open a folder. Only image previews (JPEG) are cached. Clearing the cache frees disk space but thumbnails will be regenerated on next view.
